clips.title: Windfield
clips.prompt: Soft hand-painted animation style, lush painted backgrounds, gentle warm color, whimsical, pastoral, hand-drawn 2D. Present day. A vast windswept green meadow under a huge sky of soft cumulus clouds, distant rolling hills. Afternoon, breezy. A person in simple clothes stands in the tall grass, arms out, hair and clothes fluttering, looking up. Wildflowers, a winding path, swaying grass. Warm soft daylight, painted palette. Static wide. Serene painted aesthetic, 24fps.
